summary: Tested architectural fixes implementation. Critical Issue Found: History is NOT consistently fixed at 365 days across all assets and horizons. Only DXY 90d/180d correctly shows 365-day history. BTC and SPX still use variable history lengths. Overview read-only functionality working correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: FIXED_HISTORY_DAYS = 365 not consistently applied across all assets and horizons
critical_bugs.impact: Architecture specification violated - history should always be 365 days but varies by asset

inconsistent_behavior.issue: Different extraction logic being applied to different assets
inconsistent_behavior.details: DXY 90d+ works correctly with 365 days, but BTC/SPX and DXY 30d use different history lengths

passed_tests: Overview reading from snapshots (read-only behavior confirmed)
Overview charts.actual and charts.predicted NOT empty
Overview shows systemVersion and proper structure
Snapshot endpoints accessible and returning data
Model version v3.2.0-unified present in system
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix FIXED_HISTORY_DAYS = 365 implementation. The buildFullSeries function is not being consistently applied across all assets (BTC/SPX/DXY) and all horizons (30d/90d/180d). Only DXY 90d/180d show correct 365-day history. Need to investigate why BTC and SPX extraction functions are not using the fixed history length. Check unified_extractor.ts implementation for BTC and SPX extraction logic.
